query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: Three people sit on a dark red leather couch in a living room. The person on the left wears a black tank top and pink striped skirt, the person in the center wears a white sleeveless top and denim skirt and holds a cup, and the person on the right wears a dark short-sleeved shirt and light pants. An arm from a fourth person appears at the left edge of the frame. Behind the couch, a large illuminated aquarium with rock formations sits on a shelf next to a small fan and various household items including a plastic basket and boxes. In the foreground, a small table holds a tray with papers and other objects. The walls feature wood paneling and floral wallpaper.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Three people sit on a dark red leather couch in a living room captured with the casual, unplanned energy of an amateur snapshot, where harsh direct flash creates bright specular highlights on the leather upholstery and casts hard shadows behind the subjects. The person on the left wears a black tank top and pink striped skirt, the person in the center wears a white sleeveless top and denim skirt and holds a cup, and the person on the right wears a dark short-sleeved shirt and light pants. An arm from a fourth person is abruptly cropped at the left edge of the frame. Behind the couch, a large illuminated aquarium with rock formations sits on a shelf next to a small fan and various household items including a plastic basket and boxes. In the foreground, a small table holds a tray with papers and other objects, and the walls feature wood paneling and floral wallpaper.
